default via router.example.local dev eth1 proto dhcp metric 20
10.20.0.0/16 via 10.20.30.1 dev tun0
10.20.30.0/24 dev tun0 proto kernel scope link src 10.20.30.2
10.10.10.0/24 via 10.20.30.1 dev tun0
192.168.100.0/24 dev eth1 proto kernel scope link src 192.168.100.151 metric 276
192.168.100.0/24 via 10.20.30.1 dev tun0
